error_signature: search bar fetches collection too frequently
title: Search bar fetches collection too frequently
symptom: The search bar fetches data from the API even when no input is typed, leading to glitches and incorrect search results.
applies_when: Using a search bar with an 'on change' workflow
Fetching data from a REST API
not_this_if: Search bar is not connected to an API
root_cause: The search bar's default behavior may trigger API calls too frequently without proper debouncing, causing performance issues and incorrect data fetching.
fix_steps: Create a search variable to hold the search input value.
Set up a workflow with an 'on change' trigger on the search bar.
Update the search variable with the current value of the search bar.
Refetch the collection using the search variable.
Customize the debounce time in the search settings to optimize performance.
agent_instruction: Implement a search variable and adjust the debounce settings for the search bar.
